meaning: n.患中风者adj.中风的,易患中风的
examples: He was apoplectic with rage at the decision.
My father was apoplectic when he discovered the truth.
The Apple support Web site filled up with messages from apoplectic customers.
They grow red in the face with apoplectic anger that anyone dare have a different view.
The consigner I heard turned apoplectic as there was no reserve price put on the piece.
